title: LoadOptions
description: Options for the catalog/asset/leaf Loader.load forms. With `background: true` every adopted leaf is still claimed and registered (so it heals in place and a later Loader.get returns the same instance), but its fetch is routed through the low-priority background queue instead of started immediately: it streams concurrency-capped, drops from the queue if released at refcount 0, and is boosted to fetch now on a direct `get()`. Foreground loading (no options) is unaffected.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Options for the catalog/asset/leaf Loader.load forms.

With `background: true` every adopted leaf is still claimed and registered (so it heals in place and a later Loader.get returns the same instance), but its fetch is routed through the low-priority background queue instead of started immediately: it streams concurrency-capped, drops from the queue if released at refcount 0, and is boosted to fetch now on a direct `get()`. Foreground loading (no options) is unaffected.
